title: jit init default ruleset scaffolding and existing-repo migration
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 8.2, 8.4.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] jit init scaffolds a default .jit/rules.toml reproducing the default checks.
- [hard] A one-time migration converts existing [validation] and [namespaces].{values,pattern,required} config into rules.toml, then REMOVES the old enforcement keys (hard migration, no backward-compat aliases).
- [hard] Existing repos obtain defaults without silently losing validation.
